# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-02-01'
      name: myStorageAccount
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      properties:
        location: eastus
        sku:
          name: Standard_LRS
        kind: StorageV2
        creationDateTime: '[timestamp]'
        accountType: StorageV2
        enableHttpsTrafficOnly: true

    - apiVersion: '2018-02-01'
      name: myPublicContainer
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
      properties:
        storageAccountName: ${parameters('myStorageAccount')}
        blobServiceName: default
        containerAccessLevel: container
        publicAccessLevel: container
        location: eastus

  parameters:
    myStorageAccount:
      type: string
